title: PPP-TTT Step-1 Verdict (graded triage: GO | CAUTION | STOP)
description: Aggregate output of the PPP-TTT veracity interrogation (verification/ppp-ttt/interrogate.js + index.js). Grades raised safety flags against the clinician-attested scope-registry discriminators (v1.3.0). Fail-closed: any ambiguity, unattested discriminator, off-registry condition, or module error yields STOP. Zod mirror: verification/ppp-ttt/verdict-schema.js (if they disagree, this JSON schema is the source of truth).

concerns.description: Per-flag verdicts. The run tier is the ordinal MAX across concerns (never an average).

discriminators_asked.description: Concatenated per-flag discriminators, preserving per-flag order.

evidence_considered.description: EvidenceNode / citation / receipt ids from the pipeline evidence bundle that were in view during grading.

fail_closed.description: true when any concern reached STOP via the default-deny branch (ambiguity, unattested, off-registry, module error).

reasons_if_blocking.description: Non-empty ONLY for STOP. Each string carries the literal token 'escalate_now' so the untouched trunk-sequencer detectEscalation() halts on any rendered surface (defence in depth).

tier.description: Severity ordinal GO(0) < CAUTION(1) < STOP(2). Within a run the tier may only rise; STOP is terminal and absorbing.

tier_model.description: The attested scope-registry tier model, or 'unresolved' for the fail-closed default branch.

snomed.description: Optional SNOMED binding — only ever populated from a terminology lookup receipt, never minted in-module.

mandatory_report.description: true for safeguarding_always_report verdicts — mandatory-report action, acuity-independent, no patient override.
